nasb.text: I will also appoint a place for My people Israel and will plant them, that they may live in their own place and not be disturbed again, nor will the wicked afflict them any more as formerly,

esv.text: And I will appoint a place for my people Israel and will plant them, so that they may dwell in their own place and be disturbed no more. And violent men shall afflict them no more, as formerly,

cnv.text: 我要為我的子民以色列選定一個地方，栽培他們，使他們住自己的地方，不再受騷擾；惡人也不能再像以前那樣苦待他們，
